prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KP-SPACE-ENFORCER-SILVER-FBA Product Type: TOY_GUN Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Space Blaster Galaxy Toy Gun with Sounds and Spinning Lights, Boys, Silver, Ages 3+ Description: Defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, your little one is busy fighting evil galactic villains, after dinner and homework of course. And so, to keep their pretend play sessions running at top speed across the galaxy, they’ll need the Kidplokio Space Blaster Galaxy Toy Gun with colorful, spinning lights and fast-paced supersonic sound effects to ensure victory and a safe journey home.

Made from durable plastic construction to withstand hours of pretend play, the toy gun space soldier galaxy blaster is lightweight, featuring bright lights and cool blasting sound effects. The space soldier toy gun also features a detachable magazine that rotates and flashes bright, multicolored LED lights, for even more intergalactic fighting fun.

And, let’s not forget about the fast-action trigger (this is where the action happens); upon release of the trigger, the space soldier toy gun sets off an awesome display of colorful, spinning bright lights, followed by very cool sonic blasting firing sounds, that make saving the galaxy even more fun. The toy gun comes WITH batteries, so superhero action can start right out of the box.

A great toy to get your kids off the couch and reduce screen time, the toy gun is action packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next intergalactic battle. Whether it’s an alien invasion or a space mission to a galaxy far, far away, kids will have a blast indoors or outside with this super fun Kidplokio Space Blaster Galaxy Toy Gun.

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: boys toy gun pretend play space blaster toy gun for boys super hero birthday kids gift ages 3 to 7 toddler Features: - SPACE BLASTER GALAXY TOY GUN: Featuring colorful, spinning lights and awesome blasting sound effects, aliens and evil galactic villains won’t stand a chance - FAST ACTION TOY GUN TRIGGER: This is where the action happens! Upon the release of the trigger, the Kidplokio galaxy toy gun explodes with bright, spinning lights and wild blasting sounds for the ultimate in intergalactic fighting fun - INTERGALACTIC PRETEND PLAY: A great toy to get kids off the couch and reduce screen time from cell phones and computers, the toy gun is action packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next alien invasion or a cross galaxy mission - NO ASSEMBLY NEEDED: The space galaxy blaster toy gun comes assembled with batteries included, so the superhero action can start right out of the box - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 10 x 7 x 2 inches; Weight: 0.75lbs; Batteries Included; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio Space Blaster Galaxy Toy Gun Silver

openai.item_name: Kidplokio Silver Space Blaster Galaxy Toy Gun

anthropic.title_differentiation: Spinning Lights, Blasting Sounds, Rotating LED Magazine, Fast-Action Trigger, Ages 3, Batteries Included

openai.title_differentiation: Spinning Lights, Sound Effects, Detachable Magazine, Batteries Included, Durable Plastic, Ages 3 Plus
